work_package.title: Complete Builder to Responsive Transition Boundary
work_package.current_state: Builder to Responsive handoff boundary was completed by PR #144, PR #147, and PR #148 with contract, fixture, validator, and STATUS alignment.
work_package.target_state: Builder and Project Gate to Responsive handoff is operationally clear, validation-backed, and explicitly not a responsive-correctness claim.

measurable_current_state.statement: Builder to Responsive handoff boundary was completed by PR #144, PR #147, and PR #148 with contract, fixture, validator, and STATUS alignment.
measurable_current_state.measurement: Measured by boundary contracts, schema, fixtures, validator diagnostics, STATUS, and command index coverage.

measurable_target_state.statement: Builder and Project Gate to Responsive handoff is operationally clear, validation-backed, and explicitly not a responsive-correctness claim.
measurable_target_state.measurement: Accepted when handoff contract, schema references, validator fixtures, and STATUS/docs all agree without claiming responsive correctness.

target_capability.statement: Builder and Project Gate to Responsive handoff boundary is deterministic and validation-backed without claiming live responsive correctness.
target_capability.measurement: Contract, schema, fixtures, validator diagnostics, STATUS, and command index identify allowed and blocked handoff states.

work_package.expected_project_delta: Repository has a coherent Builder to Responsive handoff boundary with schema, validator, fixture, documentation, and STATUS traceability while preserving ownership boundaries.
allowed_work: Preserve the completed Builder and Project Gate handoff boundary and patch only regressions discovered by validators or review.
Maintain boundary fixtures and diagnostics for allowed and blocked handoff states.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence unless explicitly authorized by the repository owner and current Issue #8 submitted-mode contracts.
Do not mutate Issue #8 or mark Issue #8 evidence as satisfied.
Do not run or authorize real pilot execution.
Do not claim production_ready, release_ready, live_render_validated, export_json_validated, accessibility_passed, pixel_perfect, or responsive_correctness_validated.
Do not treat CI success, merged PRs, catalog completion, Work Package completion, or queue completion as domain evidence.
must_deliver: Completed boundary contract and integration note.
Completed validator and fixture coverage for Project Gate and Builder handoff states.
Completed STATUS and command-index alignment with active checks.
must_preserve: Rolling queue remains a historical reconciled archive, not the execution driver.
Controller selection must come only from planning/EV4_AUTOMATION_WORK_PACKAGE_CATALOG.json.
Quality gates, CI, review, and evidence boundaries remain mandatory.
Technical evidence claims remain false unless real evidence gates pass.
Catalog replenishment is state-driven and must not block active Work Package execution.
Catalog replenishment must respect the single-active-mutation-PR policy.
definition_of_done: The measurable target state is met by schema-backed or validator-backed repository evidence.
The selected PR slice remains reviewable and stays under this Work Package ID.
No submitted evidence, Issue #8 mutation, pilot authorization, or forbidden readiness claim is produced by the Work Package.

split_rule.principle: A Work Package may be large in objective, but each PR must remain reviewable.

allowed_pr_slices.title: contract and schema boundary
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Clarify the handoff contract and schema references.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: validator and fixture coverage
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Add or harden deterministic eligibility checks.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

blocked_if: The work would re-open completed handoff scope without a real regression or contract drift.
completion_record_requirements: Record selected Work Package ID and PR slice ID in the PR body.
List files changed, validators changed, and CI commands run.
State commands not run and why.
Record whether catalog replenishment was checked and whether it was non-mutating, same-PR in-scope, or blocked by single-active-PR policy.
Record remaining risks and the next safe human action.
